tasks.task: Fairness slice audit: report false-negative rate and recall for stroke=1 across gender and Residence_type groups, flag worst-performing slice, and provide concrete mitigation ideas.
tasks.expected_output: Group fairness metrics and mitigation plan
tasks.reference_metrics_hint: Fail if both grouping dimensions are not analyzed, if FNR/recall metrics are absent, or if mitigation actions are not concrete.

single.result_excerpt: ## Fairness Slice Audit Report: Stroke Prediction Model ### Executive Summary I conducted a fairness audit on a stroke prediction model, analyzing **False Negative Rate (FNR)** and **Recall** across gender and residence type demographic slices. The model was trained on 5,110 patient records with severe class imbalance (only 4.9% stroke cases). --- ### Key Findings #### Overall Model Performance - **Recall**: 70.0% (with optimized threshold of 0.3) - **Precision**: 13.9% - **F1 Score**: 23.2% ###
